notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a fielder's choice. Wilyer Abreu to 2nd. Wilyer Abreu advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Willson Contreras. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Willson Contreras. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa steals (2) 2nd base. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Adley Rutschman.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson singles on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin. Tyler O'Neill to 3rd. Jeremiah Jackson to 2nd. Tyler O'Neill advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio hits a grand slam (1) to center field. Willson Contreras scores. Wilyer Abreu scores. Trevor Story scores.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Story reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
